prediction.reasoning: The current price of ZTS is $129.76. Over the past month, ZTS has shown a consistent downtrend, declining from approximately $134 at the beginning of November to its current level. Projecting this short-term bearish momentum, the point estimate for the price in 7 days is set slightly lower at $128.56. To establish the confidence intervals, an estimated average daily volatility of 1.2% was used. Scaling this volatility over 7 days (using the square root of time) yields an expected 7-day volatility. Assuming a normal distribution for price movements, the respective Z-scores for 50%, 80%, and 90% confidence levels were applied around the point estimate to derive the intervals.
